title: crataegus monogyna var. pinnatiloba
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. pinnatiloba, also known as hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus monogyna species, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in heart health, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna var. pinnatiloba include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, often used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
